activities.title: Mathematics Activities Record Keeping
activities.details: Conduct any 10 activities from the NCERT Laboratory Manual throughout the year and maintain a record. Weightage: 5 marks.

activities.title: Year End Test on Activities
activities.details: Conduct an assessment test based on the activities performed during the year end. Weightage: 3 marks.

activities.title: Viva-voce on Activities
activities.details: Oral examination regarding the activities performed. Weightage: 2 marks.
